news.title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become

news.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket

news.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.
